name: opai-mobile
description: Cross-platform OPAi Police mobile application for iOS and Android.

scripts.build:ios:staging: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.5.1 build --platform ios --profile internal-staging
scripts.build:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.5.1 build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:android:staging: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.5.1 build --platform android --profile internal-staging
scripts.build:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.5.1 build --platform android --profile production
scripts.submit:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.5.1 submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.submit:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli@20.5.1 submit --platform android --profile production
scripts.test: node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test --experimental-strip-types src/services/*.test.ts src/services/weather/*.test.ts src/theme/*.test.ts src/features/assistant/*.test.ts src/features/audioStatement/*.test.ts src/features/paidDuty/*.test.ts src/features/canvass/*.test.ts src/features/mentalHealth/*.test.ts src/release/*.test.ts
